inputs.label: Number of Neutrons (N)
inputs.businessContext: Number of neutrons in the nucleus.

inputs.label: Proton Mass
inputs.businessContext: Rest mass of a proton in atomic mass units.

inputs.label: Neutron Mass
inputs.businessContext: Rest mass of a neutron in atomic mass units.

inputs.label: Nucleus Mass
inputs.businessContext: Actual measured mass of the nucleus in atomic mass units.

inputs.label: Mass-Energy Conversion (c²)
inputs.businessContext: Energy equivalent of 1 u, standard value 931.494 MeV/u.

formulas.bindingEnergyPerNucleon: ((protons * protonMass + neutrons * neutronMass - nucleusMass) * conversionFactor) / Math.max(1, (protons + neutrons))
